reviews.review_description: I absolutely LOVE this game! I love how you can pet the capybara! It’s so fun to get chill with the cute lil coconut doggie. I can’t wait to see what they do with the game once it’s out of early access. Best game ever. CAPYBARA!!!!!!!!!! 😍😍

It was really cool and really awesome and can you make it a little bit more easier because I can’t find the key to make it more easier to find a key. Can you do that and upload more and can you make an another game with a lot of cap bar, you could pet it, and take care of it a house right next to where you could bring the cabby borrow inside a house but your house because that will be more cooler of the game. Can you add instructions if a kid plays this game for kids we get a little bit more easier for kids. Can you add a lot of updates and more toys and more food? Can you please don’t turn it put it in a treasure box or if you want to make the key more easier to find, please put the treasure right next to the table or somewhere easy please not really hard to find. Can you sing to bright up when you go somewhere very dark and it’s really dark can you bright it up like a button to see more light because I can’t find the key if it dark because the corner is very dark there’s a lot shade make a button like you could turn up the brightness more better and more animals and more please please please and can you make more cabby borrows games so I could give you a lot of stars because I love Cappy bars they’re so cute thank you if you did it thank you so much💝💘💓💗💕💞💖
